creator: koden@bsdmail.com
text:
Message from html2text-1.3.2a:
===>   NOTICE:

The html2text port currently does not have a maintainer. As a result, it is
more likely to have unresolved issues, not be up-to-date, or even be removed in
the future.

Message from links1-1.03_1,1:
===>   NOTICE:

The links1 port currently does not have a maintainer. As a result, it is
more likely to have unresolved issues, not be up-to-date, or even be removed in
the future.
